creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 198732
lmms.diff

Looks like kde@ wants to deprecate Qt 4 [1].  The attached patch
switches LMMS to Qt 5.  Probably should only be landed when Qt 4
is actually deprecated.  Qt 5 support seems to have stabilized in
LMMS and works nicely now.  When I tried this earlier this year
it was still very unstable.

[1] https://reviews.freebsd.org/D17741
